name: ADMS Production Cluster
description: AKS cluster hosting the ADMS real-time network control platform.

name: CRM App Service
description: Azure App Service hosting Dynamics 365 CRM and WMS frontends.

name: SAP HANA Database
description: SAP HANA in-memory database hosting SAP S/4HANA for AM, Finance, and HR.

name: Data Lake Storage
description: Azure Data Lake Gen2 storage account for enterprise analytics.

name: Integration Gateway
description: Azure API Management and Service Bus instances for system integration.

name: ADMS SCADA Gateway
description: On-premises SCADA front-end processor connecting substation RTUs to ADMS.

name: Corporate Active Directory
description: Microsoft Active Directory for identity management and access control.

name: Network Operations Centre
description: NOC workstations and display systems for real-time network monitoring.
